title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 333.091 - License to be displayed
text:
333.091.  License to be displayed. — All licenses or registrations, or duplicates thereof, issued pursuant to this chapter shall be displayed at each place of business.
(L. 1965 p. 522 § 9, A.L. 1981 S.B. 16, A.L. 2009 S.B. 1, A.L. 2011 H.B. 265 merged with S.B. 325)
